# godot-toolbox

> AI-native Godot 4.6+ bootstrap control plane. 24 curated plugin packs, manifest-driven assembly, CI-verified contracts, optional RPG scaffolds.

## Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/codefromkarl/godot-toolbox.git
cd godot-toolbox
./scripts/bootstrap_toolbox_project.sh /path/to/new-project --packs=validation,debug
```

Preview pack assembly without writing files:
```bash
./scripts/bootstrap_toolbox_project.sh ../preview --packs=flow-core,simulation-core,data-core,save-core --dry-run-report
```

## Pack System

Packs are defined in `packs.manifest.json` with:
- `kind`: baseline | optional-pack | architecture-core | architecture-test-kit
- `requires`: dependency packs (must be co-selected)
- `conflicts`: mutually exclusive packs
- `autoloads`: singleton scripts injected into project.godot
- `verification`: scripts that validate pack contracts
- `godot_version.min`: minimum Godot version (currently 4.6)

Upstream plugins are pinned in `upstreams.lock.json` with git refs. Update via:
```bash
./scripts/update_plugin_from_upstream.sh --id=<plugin_id> --dry-run
```

## Pack Categories

### Baseline (always included)
- `base` ‚Äî gdUnit4 testing + gdtoolkit linting

### Optional Vendor Packs (opt-in)
- `validation` ‚Äî Godot Doctor: resource/scene constraint validation
- `debug` ‚Äî Signal Lens: signal flow visualization
- `stateful` ‚Äî Godot State Charts: state machine architecture
- `juice` ‚Äî Sparkle Lite: game-feel effects
- `automation` ‚Äî GodotE2E: runtime UI/E2E testing
- `input` ‚Äî G.U.I.D.E: cross-device input mapping
- `inventory` ‚Äî GLoot: inventory/equipment authoring
- `quest` ‚Äî QuestSystem: resource-driven quest management
- `ai-behavior` ‚Äî Beehave: behavior tree AI
- `save-state-lite` ‚Äî SaveState Lite: advanced save tooling (conflicts with save-core)
- `dialogue` ‚Äî Dialogue Manager: dialogue graph authoring

### Architecture Packs (toolbox-owned, no vendored dependencies)
- `flow-core` ‚Äî game mode/flow stack with FlowCore autoload
- `simulation-core` ‚Äî tick scheduler and system contracts
- `data-core` ‚Äî data registry with stable ID contracts
- `save-core` ‚Äî versioned snapshots and atomic JSON writes
- `rules-events-core` ‚Äî event/condition/effect execution spine
- `ui-game-shell` ‚Äî menu, pause, modal, loading primitives
- `flow-test-kit` ‚Äî flow smoke fixtures and gdUnit4 suites
- `ai-testing` ‚Äî AI-driven test exploration framework
- `rpg-core` ‚Äî RPG character/party/wallet/equipment state
- `rpg-battle-core` ‚Äî turn-based battle contracts
- `rpg-save-adapter` ‚Äî RPG state to save-core serialization
- `rpg-test-kit` ‚Äî battle replay, event stream, state dump evidence
- `rpg-art-demo` ‚Äî first-party placeholder art/audio scaffold

## Key Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `packs.manifest.json` | Pack definitions, dependencies, autoloads |
| `upstreams.lock.json` | Pinned upstream plugin versions and refs |
| `scripts/bootstrap_toolbox_project.sh` | Assemble new project from selected packs |
| `scripts/verify_bootstrap_flow.sh` | End-to-end bootstrap + import + smoke verification |
| `scripts/verify_game_architecture_packs.sh` | Architecture pack contract verification |
| `scripts/verify_pack_matrix.sh --all` | Full pack matrix verification |
| `scripts/import_plugin_from_upstream.sh` | Import new upstream plugin |
| `scripts/update_plugin_from_upstream.sh` | Update pinned upstream plugin |
| `templates/base/` | Base project template (gdUnit4 + gdtoolkit) |
| `docs/plugin-catalog.md` | Plugin catalog with selection rationale |
| `docs/plugin-integration-standard.md` | Plugin integration requirements |
| `docs/selection-framework.md` | Selection axis framework |
| `docs/maintenance-workflow.md` | Import, update, assembly, verification manual |
